Aiming.name: Aiming
Aiming.description: Batters with higher Aiming are better at hitting line drives.

Contact.name: Contact
Contact.description: Batters with higher Contact have a greater ability to hit the ball into play, on pitches within and outside the strike zone.

Cunning.name: Cunning
Cunning.description: Batters with high Cunning can coerce the pitcher to hit them with the pitch, advancing them instantly to first base.

Discipline.name: Discipline
Discipline.description: It affects a batter's ability to avoid swinging at pitches that land outside the strike zone, avoiding Strikes and increasing Balls.

Insight.name: Insight
Insight.description: Batters with a higher Insight can choose where in the field of play their hit ball will land, generally increases bases gained by themself and their teammates already on base.

Intimidation.name: Intimidation
Intimidation.description: Batters with high Intimidation can scare the opposing pitcher into throwing fewer pitches within the strike zone.

Lift.name: Lift
Lift.description: Batters with high Lift will hit more fly balls.

Vision.name: Vision
Vision.description: A higher Vision attribute correlates with an improved ability for the batter to swing at pitches within the strike zone.

Determination.name: Determination
Determination.description: Batters with a high Determination are more likely to foul off balls pitched to them outside the strike zone.

Wisdom.name: Wisdom
Wisdom.description: Batters with a higher Wisdom are able to "learn from each pitch", reducing their odds of being struck out.

Muscle.name: Muscle
Muscle.description: According to statistical analysis of lineups re-ordered by Paradigm Shift, players with higher Muscle are more likely to hit Home Runs and Doubles.

Selflessness.name: Selflessness
Selflessness.description: Batters with high Selflessness are more likely to hit into sacrifice plays.

Guts.name: Guts
Guts.description: Pitchers with high Guts will play better as their Energy lowers.

Stamina.name: Stamina
Stamina.description: Pitchers with high Stamina can continue to pitch to the best of their ability, even as their Energy fades.

Accuracy.name: Accuracy
Accuracy.description: Its exact function is unknown, however it can be assumed to impact where a Pitcher throws the ball.

Rotation.name: Rotation
Rotation.description: Pitchers with high Rotation throw balls which are harder for Batters to hit into play.

Presence.name: Presence
Presence.description: Pitchers with high Presence will pressure opposing batters, reducing their ability to hit home runs.

Persuasion.name: Persuasion
Persuasion.description: Pitchers with higher Persuasion will make opposing batters produce more foul balls.

Velocity.name: Velocity
Velocity.description: Its exact function is unknown, however batters opposing a pitcher with high Velocity are less likely to swing at pitches within the strike zone.

Control.name: Control
Control.description: Pitchers with high Control are better at keeping their pitches within the strike zone.

Stuff.name: Stuff
Stuff.description: Batters opposing a pitcher with high Stuff are less likely to hit line drives and fly balls.

Defiance.name: Defiance
Defiance.description: Pitchers with high Defiance are more likely to defy a manager when they appear on the mound, remaining in the game instead of being swapped for a relief pitcher.

Acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
Acrobatics.description: Players with higher Acrobatics are better at fielding Line Drives.

Agility.name: Agility
Agility.description: Fielders with higher Agility are better at fielding Fly Balls.

Arm.name: Arm
Arm.description: Fielders with high Arm will reduce the opposing Batters' ability to hit Doubles and Triples.

Awareness.name: Awareness
Awareness.description: High Awareness allows Fielders to make Double Plays more often, and can prevent stolen bases.

Composure.name: Composure
Composure.description: Fielders with higher Composure are less likely to make Fielding Errors.

Dexterity.name: Dexterity
Dexterity.description: Fielders with high dexterity can prevent runners on base from advancing.

Patience.name: Patience
Patience.description: Fielders with high Patience are better at fielding Popups.

Reaction.name: Reaction
Reaction.description: Fielders with a higher Reaction are better at fielding Ground Balls.

Greed.name: Greed
Greed.description: Baserunners with a higher Greed are likelier to try to steal bases.

Performance.name: Performance
Performance.description: Players with high Performance are more successful at reaching bases while the ball is in play.

Speed.name: Speed
Speed.description: Players with a higher speed will tend to gain more bases, on fly balls or ground balls.

Stealth.name: Stealth
Stealth.description: Players with higher Stealth will steal bases more often, and be more successful at doing so.

Luck.name: Luck
Luck.description: Players with higher Luck will have better outcomes from weather-based events.
